title: anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. ecklonii
intro: Anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. ecklonii, also known as the Veldt grass, is a type of perennial grass native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. ecklonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
